title: actinocephalus ochrocephalus
intro: Actinocephalus ochrocephalus, also known as yellow top, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly found in South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Actinocephalus ochrocephalus include its potential to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Actinocephalus ochrocephalus typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin conditions.
